jd_text: Our client is a regional marketing and communications group supporting leading brands across the Middle East. The organisation is enhancing its digital and performance marketing capabilities. The Role The Director will lead media strategy, digital performance, and analytics across key client accounts. This role will oversee paid media, programmatic buying, and performance optimisation. A key focus will be delivering measurable ROI and data-driven insights. The Director will manage senior teams and agency partners. This role will also contribute to new business pitches and capability development. Leadership in a fast-paced client environment is essential. Candidate Profile The ideal candidate will have senior media or digital performance leadership experience within agencies or brand-side teams. Strong exposure to data analytics and performance optimisation is essential. Experience in the UAE or regional markets is highly preferred. The candidate must demonstrate commercial awareness, leadership capability, and client-facing credibility.
